title: Contact | Dame Karen Bradley MP
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Dame Karen Bradley, Member of Parliament for Staffordshire Moorlands
headings: h3: Dame Karen Bradley MP Member of Parliament for Staffordshire Moorlands
text_excerpt: Contact | Dame Karen Bradley MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Karen News Campaigns Contact Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme Residents Survey In Parliament Contact Leave this field blank Constituency Office Unit 24 Smithfield Centre, Haywood St, Leek, ST13 5JW 01538 382 421 [email protected] @karenbradleymoorlandsmp If you are a resident of Staffordshire Moorlands please use the form below to get in touch with Karen. Information you provide on this form will be used by Dame Karen Bradley MP who will be the data controller for this data, for the purposes of assisting with the matter you have raised. The information will be processed in accordance with our privacy policy, which you can view on Karen's website. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy. Dame Karen Bradley MP Member of Parliament for Staffordshire Moorlands Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Karen Promoted by James Aberley on behalf of Dame Karen Bradley of 50 Broad Street, Leek ST13 5NS.
